rulings.Case Title: MARK E. DVORAK VS. GARY T. MCCAULEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Defendant Gary T. Mccauley To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for attorney's fees. Motion is denied as to paragraph 15 and Exhibit 15. Moving party failed to show that the allegations are immaterial or irrelevant as to the 3-5 causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK E. DVORAK VS. GARY T. MCCAULEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for partition. Causes of action for constructive fraud, breach of fiduciary duty and UCL violation are sufficiently alleged. Alliance Mortgage Co. v. Rothwell (1995) 10 Cal.4th 1226. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN BANAYAN ET AL VS. MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS and GROSVENOR PROPERTIES, LTD's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges fraud and conscious disregard of plaintiffs rights and safety. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Request For Punitive Damages By Defendant Zoriall Llc To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: 3Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT ZORIALL LLC's Motion To Strike Request For Punitive Damages in the First Amended Complaint DENIED, request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT ZORIALL LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Each cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Additionally, nuisance cause of action is not duplicative of the negligence cause of action as punitive damages rare requested. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Defendant's request for judicial notice of the recorded documents is granted. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to (1) the first cause of action to allege each element of wrongful foreclosure in light of judicially noticeable documents re: dates of recordation of the foreclosure documents; (2) the second cause of action to allege facts giving rise to the requisite relationship to allege concealment and to allege all elements of fraud with specificity; (3) the third cause of action to allege facts re: fraudulent, unlawful or unfair prongs; (4) as to the fourth cause of action to allege the requisite relationship and balance due to Plaintiff on account. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BEVERLY J. JOINER VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC, A COLORADO LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Request For Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 5. OSC Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Request For Temporary Restraining Order Continued to August 28, 2015 for opposing party to file its opposition referenced in reply no later than August 11, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than August 11, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SYLVIA KWONG VS. TRACY D NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories(Set One) And Production Of Documents(Set One), And For Monetaey Sanctions

Sanctions granted in the amount of $997.5. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THANH PHAM VS. LAWRENCE CHEUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reinstate Vacated Defualt And Judgment And Order Issuance Of Writ Of Execution
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 9. PLAINTIFF THANH PHAM's Motion To Reinstate Vacated Default And Judgment And Order Issuance Of Writ Of Execution OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and the Court's Minute Order requesting delivery of a courtesy copy of the motion. No courtesy copy of the moving papers as of 10:15 a.m. on August 10, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATEL, MANJULA DBA ELLIS HOTEL & K. MIRANDA, PROP. VS. ERIC GALINDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Otion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 11, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT ERIC GALINDO's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ GRANTED. Defendant shall file answer no later than August 11, 2105 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
